title: Mutiny faucet copy leaks internal review language and weak positioning
excerpt: The live site is explicit that no account is required, which makes the value proposition unusually clear for a coming-soon page. Strong fit for Bitcoin development and testing workflows where an agent needs testnet sats before it can continue.
notes: This is weak because it describes the research process instead of stating the user-facing fact directly.
'value proposition' and 'Strong fit for' are vague and generic.
Mentioning 'coming-soon' inside the value proposition weakens the public landing-page copy.
